input_text: Masa kecil dulu kat kampung, setiap petang mesti main galah panjang dengan budak-budak sekampung. Sekarang anak-anak dah tak main dah, semua pegang tablet je.
reason: Nostalgic post about childhood kampung games in Malaysia. Harmless personal memory.

input_text: Dulu masa aku darjah 3, mak aku selalu masak nasi lemak pagi-pagi. Bau sambal tumis tu memang bangunkan satu rumah. Rindu zaman tu.
reason: Nostalgic memory about mother cooking nasi lemak. Wholesome family content.

input_text: Semalam jiran sebelah rumah tolong angkat baju aku yang sidai luar sebab hujan lebat. Alhamdulillah, masih ada orang baik macam ni.
reason: Story about neighbourly kindness helping with laundry during rain. Positive community spirit.

input_text: Baru try makan kat Warung Pak Mat dekat Cyberjaya. Nasi campur dia memang sedap, lauk fresh dan harga pun berpatutan. 4/5 bintang dari aku!
reason: Positive food review of a local warung. Harmless restaurant recommendation.

input_text: Korang kalau nak pergi Cameron Highlands, elakkan cuti sekolah sebab sesak gila. Pergi weekday, sejuk dan tenang. Trust me.
reason: Travel tip about visiting Cameron Highlands. Practical advice for Malaysian travellers.

input_text: Tips jimat duit: aku guna app Setel untuk isi minyak sebab selalu ada cashback. Sebulan boleh jimat RM30-40 jugak tu.
reason: Personal finance tip about using cashback app for petrol. Helpful money-saving advice.

input_text: Kucing aku baru adopt dari SPCA Sunway. Nama dia Milo sebab warna bulu dia macam Milo ais. Dah start manja dah dengan aku.
reason: Pet adoption story from SPCA. Positive animal welfare content.

input_text: Hari tu join gotong-royong bersihkan sungai kat Taman Melawati. Memang banyak sampah plastik, tapi rasa puas hati dapat contribute.
reason: Volunteer story about river cleanup gotong-royong. Positive community and environmental content.

input_text: Benda paling lawak pasal hidup kat Malaysia: kita boleh makan nasi lemak pukul 3 pagi dan takde orang judge. Best country ever.
reason: Humorous observation about Malaysian food culture. Light-hearted and positive.

input_text: Anak aku baru masuk tadika tahun ni. Hari pertama menangis tak nak lepas tangan, tapi balik sekolah cerita macam-macam. Comel sangat.
reason: Parenting experience about child's first day at kindergarten. Wholesome family story.

input_text: Siapa pernah kahwin kat dewan komuniti? Nak tanya budget berapa korang habiskan. Kami target bawah RM15k je.
reason: Wedding planning discussion asking about community hall wedding budget. Normal social inquiry.

input_text: Baru pindah rumah dari apartment ke landed house kat Rawang. Penat gila packing tapi lega dah settle. Sekarang nak renovate dapur pulak.
reason: Moving house story from apartment to landed house. Normal life update.

input_text: Cuaca panas sangat sekarang, aku start jogging pukul 6.30 pagi je. Kalau lambat sikit memang tak tahan dah terik dia.
reason: Health and fitness tip adapted to Malaysian hot climate. Practical exercise advice.

input_text: Zaman sekolah rendah dulu, paling best bila cikgu bawa pergi lawatan ke kilang roti Gardenia. Dapat roti free lagi tu haha.
reason: Nostalgic childhood memory of school trip to Gardenia bread factory. Lighthearted reminiscence.

input_text: Jiran aku yang Chinese family selalu bagi kuih bakul masa Tahun Baru Cina. Kami pun balas bagi rendang masa Raya. Inilah Malaysia.
reason: Story about inter-ethnic food sharing between neighbours during festivals. Positive multicultural content.

input_text: Review jujur: Roti John kat Uptown Damansara memang overrated. Roti keras, daging sikit. Baik beli kat pasar malam biasa, lagi sedap.
reason: Honest negative food review of a popular food stall. Normal consumer opinion.

input_text: Kalau korang nak road trip ke Ipoh dari KL, singgah kat Gopeng dulu. Ada white water rafting best gila, harga pun affordable.
reason: Travel recommendation for road trip with activity suggestion. Helpful travel content.

input_text: Aku dah mula ajar anak kecik simpan duit dalam tabung. Setiap kali dia tolong kemas rumah, aku bagi 50 sen. Biar dia belajar dari kecil.
reason: Parenting approach to teaching children financial literacy. Positive educational content.

input_text: Kucing jalanan kat kawasan rumah aku dah jadi macam kucing komuniti. Semua jiran contribute makanan. Ada yang buat rumah kucing dari kotak lagi.
reason: Community cat care story showing neighbourhood cooperation. Positive animal welfare content.

input_text: Minggu lepas join program sukarelawan ajar budak orang asli baca. Memang touching bila tengok semangat diorang nak belajar.
reason: Volunteer story about teaching Orang Asli children to read. Positive educational and charity content.

input_text: Benda yang aku miss pasal growing up kat Malaysia: bunyi azan subuh, then mak goreng telur, then pergi sekolah naik basikal. Simple life.
reason: Nostalgic reminiscence about simple childhood mornings in Malaysia. Wholesome personal memory.

input_text: Baru habis renovate bilik air rumah. Tukar dari bilik air lama tahun 90-an ke design moden. Habis dalam RM8k termasuk tiles dan fitting.
reason: Renovation story sharing bathroom upgrade costs. Practical home improvement content.

input_text: Aku start meal prep setiap Ahad untuk lunch seminggu. Jimat masa dan duit, plus boleh control kalori. Sesuai sangat untuk orang kerja office.
reason: Health and personal finance tip about meal prepping. Practical lifestyle advice.

input_text: Masa kecil dulu selalu ikut ayah pergi kedai kopi pagi. Dia order kopi O, aku milo ais. Sekarang ayah dah takde, tapi setiap kali minum kopi teringat dia.
reason: Nostalgic personal story about visiting kopitiam with late father. Emotional but wholesome memory.

input_text: Kenduri kahwin kampung memang lain level. Semua orang tolong masak, pasang khemah, angkat kerusi. Inilah semangat gotong-royong yang aku rindu.
reason: Nostalgic appreciation of kampung wedding gotong-royong spirit. Positive community content.

input_text: Aku baru discover ada hiking trail best kat Bukit Tabur. View dia memang cantik gila, boleh nampak KL skyline. Recommend sangat untuk weekend activity.
reason: Travel and fitness recommendation for local hiking trail. Positive outdoor activity content.

input_text: Anak aku yang sulung baru dapat masuk sekolah berasrama penuh. Bangga tapi sedih jugak sebab pertama kali dia jauh dari rumah.
reason: Parenting experience about child entering boarding school. Normal emotional family moment.

input_text: Lawak gila tadi kat mamak. Aku order teh tarik kurang manis, abang tu bagi teh tarik extra manis. Malaysian service at its finest haha.
reason: Humorous everyday observation about mamak restaurant mix-up. Light-hearted Malaysian life content.

input_text: Mak aku ajar resepi sambal belacan warisan nenek. Aku dah try buat sendiri, memang rasa lain macam. Ada sentimental value tu.
reason: Story about learning family heritage recipe. Wholesome cultural preservation content.

input_text: Dulu kat kampung ada sungai belakang rumah, setiap petang mandi sungai dengan kawan-kawan. Air jernih gila. Sekarang sungai tu dah kotor, sedih betul.
reason: Nostalgic memory about playing in kampung river with environmental observation. Harmless personal reflection.

input_text: Baru adopt anjing dari Malaysian Dogs Deserve Better. Nama dia Rocky, mixed breed tapi very loyal. Siapa kata anjing campuran tak best?
reason: Pet adoption story from local rescue organisation. Positive animal welfare advocacy.

input_text: ASB dividen tahun ni 4.25%, alhamdulillah. Siapa yang consistent simpan setiap bulan mesti rasa berbaloi sekarang. Kunci dia: sabar dan konsisten.
reason: Personal finance discussion about ASB dividend returns. Practical investment advice for Malaysians.

input_text: Cuti sekolah ni bawa family pergi Langkawi. Pantai Cenang still the best, makanan pun murah. Duty free chocolate memang wajib beli.
reason: Family travel story to Langkawi with recommendations. Positive travel content.

input_text: Penat gila pindah rumah sendiri tanpa lori. Guna Myvi je angkut barang 5 trip. Jimat tapi memang azab haha.
reason: Humorous story about moving house using a small car. Relatable Malaysian experience.

input_text: Aku rasa swimming paling sesuai exercise kat Malaysia. Panas terik pun tak rasa, and it's full body workout. Highly recommend for beginners.
reason: Fitness recommendation suited to Malaysian climate. Practical health advice.

input_text: When I was growing up in Penang, every evening the whole neighbourhood would come out and chat while the kids played by the road. Those kampung vibes in the city were something special.
reason: Nostalgic post about childhood community life in Penang. Wholesome personal memory.

input_text: Just had the most amazing cendol at that stall in Melaka near Jonker Street. The gula melaka was so rich and the coconut milk was fresh. Best RM3 I've ever spent.
reason: Positive food review of cendol in Melaka. Harmless culinary recommendation.

input_text: My neighbour uncle Chen helped us push our car when it broke down in the rain yesterday. Didn't even ask for anything, just smiled and went back home. Malaysia boleh!
reason: Good deed story about neighbourly help. Positive multicultural community content.

input_text: Planning a road trip from KL to Kota Kinabalu via driving to Sabah. Anyone done this before? How many days should I budget and what are the must-stop places?
reason: Travel planning inquiry about road trip across Malaysia. Normal information-seeking post.

input_text: Honest tip for young Malaysians: start your EPF voluntary contribution early. Even RM100 a month makes a huge difference by the time you're 55. Compound interest is real.
reason: Personal finance advice about EPF voluntary contributions. Helpful financial literacy content.

input_text: My cat Oyen has become the unofficial mascot of our taman. Everyone knows him and feeds him. He literally visits every house on the street like he's doing rounds.
reason: Charming story about a community cat in a Malaysian neighbourhood. Positive pet content.

input_text: Spent my weekend volunteering at a soup kitchen in KL. We served over 200 meals to the homeless community. It really puts things in perspective.
reason: Charity volunteering story at soup kitchen. Positive social impact content.

input_text: Only in Malaysia can you experience all four seasons in one day — morning sun, afternoon rain, evening cool breeze, and night humidity that makes you question your life choices.
reason: Humorous observation about Malaysian weather. Light-hearted and relatable content.

input_text: My daughter just started primary school and she came home excited because her best friend speaks three languages. She asked me why she only knows two. Malaysian kids are something else!
reason: Wholesome parenting story about multilingual Malaysian children. Positive multicultural content.

input_text: We decided on a garden wedding at a homestay in Janda Baik instead of a hotel ballroom. Saved about RM20k and the photos turned out way more beautiful. Highly recommend!
reason: Wedding planning advice about alternative venue. Practical and positive content.

input_text: Just finished renovating our 1990s terrace house kitchen. Went with an open concept layout and it completely transformed the space. Total cost was around RM25k including new cabinets.
reason: Home renovation story with cost breakdown. Practical home improvement content.

input_text: Started doing morning yoga at KLCC Park before work. The combination of fresh air, greenery, and the twin towers in the background is honestly therapeutic. Free some more!
reason: Health and fitness story about outdoor yoga in KL. Positive lifestyle content.

input_text: Growing up in a Malaysian Chinese family, every Sunday was dim sum day without fail. My ah kong would order everything on the menu and we'd just eat until we couldn't move.
reason: Nostalgic family memory about dim sum tradition. Wholesome cultural content.

input_text: I've been meal prepping traditional Malaysian food for the week — rendang, sambal, ulam — instead of buying from the office canteen. My monthly food budget dropped from RM800 to RM400.
reason: Personal finance and health tip combining Malaysian food with meal prep. Practical lifestyle content.

input_text: The gotong-royong spirit is alive and well in our neighbourhood. Last weekend 30 of us cleaned up the playground and repainted the benches. The kids were so happy to play there again.
reason: Community gotong-royong story about playground cleanup. Positive civic engagement content.

input_text: Malaysian parenting hack: if your toddler won't eat rice, mix it with a tiny bit of kicap manis. Works every single time. You're welcome.
reason: Light-hearted parenting tip with Malaysian food twist. Harmless family advice.

input_text: Took the scenic train from Gemas to Tumpat last week. 12 hours of pure kampung views, rice paddies, and small town charm. Best RM50 I've ever spent on travel.
reason: Travel recommendation about scenic train journey through Malaysia. Positive tourism content.

input_text: Adopted two rabbits from a rescue centre in Petaling Jaya. They've completely taken over the living room but my kids have never been happier. Best family decision we've made.
reason: Pet adoption story bringing joy to the family. Positive animal welfare content.

input_text: My husband and I do a monthly budget review using a simple spreadsheet. Since starting this habit 2 years ago, we've managed to save enough for a down payment on a house in Seremban.
reason: Personal finance success story about budgeting and home ownership goal. Inspirational financial content.

input_text: There's something magical about the teh tarik guy's technique. It's not just tea — it's performance art. And it actually does taste better when pulled high. Science or magic? You decide.
reason: Humorous appreciation of teh tarik culture. Light-hearted Malaysian food content.

input_text: Our community organized a free health screening at the surau last weekend. Blood pressure, blood sugar, BMI — all checked. Over 100 residents showed up. This is how we look after each other.
reason: Community health initiative story. Positive civic and health content.

input_text: Moving from KL back to my hometown in Kuching was the best decision I made. Lower cost of living, closer to family, and laksa sarawak every morning. No regrets.
reason: Personal story about relocating back to hometown. Positive life decision content.

input_text: 小时候在马来西亚长大，最喜欢的就是放学后去mamak档吃roti canai。那个味道到现在都忘不了，每次回去一定要吃。
reason: Nostalgic memory about eating roti canai after school in Malaysia. Wholesome childhood recollection.

input_text: 昨天邻居阿姨送了一大盘她自己做的娘惹糕过来，我们回送了一锅肉骨茶。这就是马来西亚邻里之间的温暖。
reason: Neighbourly food exchange story between Malaysian families. Positive community content.

input_text: 推荐大家去怡保旧街场的点心，真的超好吃又便宜。虾饺和叉烧包是必点的，一个人吃不到RM20。
reason: Food recommendation for dim sum in Ipoh old town. Positive restaurant review.

input_text: 上周末全家去金马伦高原度假，天气凉爽得像开了冷气一样。草莓园的草莓新鲜到不行，孩子们玩得好开心。
reason: Family travel story to Cameron Highlands. Positive vacation content.

input_text: 分享一个理财心得：每个月发薪水后先存20%进定期存款，剩下的才用来消费。坚持三年下来存了不少。大马年轻人一定要学会理财。
reason: Personal finance tip about saving strategy. Practical financial advice for Malaysian youth.

input_text: 我家的猫咪叫小橘，是从巴生的流浪猫收容所领养的。刚带回来很怕人，现在天天粘着我不放，超可爱。
reason: Pet adoption story from a shelter in Klang. Positive animal welfare content.

input_text: 上个月参加了学校组织的义工活动，去老人院陪老人家聊天唱歌。虽然只是简单的陪伴，但看到他们笑了真的很感动。
reason: Volunteer story visiting an old folks home. Positive charitable content.

input_text: 马来西亚最搞笑的事：下雨的时候大家开车都变成蜗牛，但雨一停马上变赛车手。每次都这样，永远不变哈哈。
reason: Humorous observation about Malaysian driving behaviour in rain. Light-hearted content.

input_text: 孩子今年开始上华小一年级了，每天回来用三种语言跟我讲学校的事。马来西亚的多元教育环境真的很特别。
reason: Parenting experience about multilingual education in Malaysian Chinese school. Positive educational content.

input_text: 刚搬进新家，花了RM15k装修厨房和客厅。虽然预算有限，但自己设计的感觉就是不一样。慢慢来，一步一步把家弄得漂亮。
reason: Home renovation story with budget details. Practical home improvement content.

input_text: 在马来西亚健身最大的挑战就是天气太热。我现在改成早上五点半去跑步，凉快又没什么车，空气也新鲜。
reason: Fitness advice adapted to Malaysian hot climate. Practical health content.

input_text: 小时候过年最开心的就是跟着爸爸去拜年收红包，然后去买鞭炮放。现在虽然不能放鞭炮了，但那些回忆永远在心里。
reason: Nostalgic Chinese New Year childhood memory in Malaysia. Wholesome cultural content.

input_text: 结婚酒席我们选了在餐馆办，一桌RM1200，总共20桌。比酒店便宜很多，味道还更好。推荐预算有限的新人考虑。
reason: Wedding planning advice about restaurant reception as budget option. Practical content.

input_text: 我每天走路去巴刹买菜，顺便当运动。新鲜蔬菜水果比超市便宜，走一圈也消耗了不少卡路里，一举两得。
reason: Combined health and frugal living tip about walking to wet market. Positive lifestyle content.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் வளர்ந்த காலத்தில் ஒவ்வொரு தீபாவளியும் மிகவும் சிறப்பாக இருக்கும். அம்மா செய்யும் முறுக்கு மற்றும் லட்டு சுவை இன்றும் நினைவில் இருக்கிறது.
reason: Nostalgic Deepavali memory about mother's traditional sweets. Wholesome cultural content.

input_text: எங்கள் பக்கத்து வீட்டு மலாய் குடும்பம் ஒவ்வொரு ஹரிராயாவிற்கும் ரெண்டாங் கொடுப்பார்கள். நாங்களும் தீபாவளிக்கு இனிப்பு கொடுப்போம். இதுதான் மலேசியாவின் அழகு.
reason: Inter-ethnic food sharing story during festivals. Positive multicultural community content.

input_text: கோலாலம்பூரில் உள்ள பிரிக் ஃபீல்ட்ஸ் இந்திய உணவகத்தில் மீன் தலை கறி சாப்பிட்டேன். மிகவும் சுவையாக இருந்தது, விலையும் நியாயமாக இருந்தது.
reason: Positive food review of fish head curry in Brickfields KL. Harmless restaurant recommendation.

input_text: கடந்த வாரம் குடும்பத்துடன் பினாங்கு சென்றோம். ஜார்ஜ்டவுன் தெருக்கலை மிகவும் அழகாக இருந்தது. குழந்தைகள் மிகவும் மகிழ்ச்சியாக இருந்தார்கள்.
reason: Family travel story to Penang enjoying street art. Positive tourism content.

input_text: ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் சம்பளத்தில் 10% KWSP தன்னார்வ பங்களிப்பு செய்கிறேன். ஓய்வு பெறும்போது நிம்மதியாக இருக்க இப்போதே திட்டமிட வேண்டும்.
reason: Personal finance advice about voluntary EPF contribution. Practical retirement planning content.

input_text: எங்கள் தோட்டத்தில் ஒரு நாய்க்குட்டியை தத்தெடுத்தோம். பெயர் ராஜா. இப்போது குழந்தைகளின் சிறந்த நண்பனாக இருக்கிறான்.
reason: Pet adoption story about a puppy named Raja. Wholesome family and animal content.

input_text: கோயில் திருவிழாவில் அன்னதானம் செய்ய உதவி செய்தேன். ஆயிரக்கணக்கான பேருக்கு உணவு வழங்கியது மிகவும் மனநிறைவாக இருந்தது.
reason: Volunteer story about helping with temple food distribution. Positive charity content.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் மிகவும் சுவாரஸ்யமான விஷயம் என்னவென்றால், நாம் ஒரே நாளில் நாசி லெமக், ரொட்டி சனாய், இட்லி எல்லாம் சாப்பிடலாம்!
reason: Humorous observation about Malaysia's diverse food options. Positive multicultural content.

input_text: என் மகள் தமிழ்ப் பள்ளியில் படிக்கிறாள். மலாய், ஆங்கிலம், தமிழ் மூன்று மொழிகளும் கற்றுக்கொள்கிறாள். மலேசிய கல்வி அமைப்பின் சிறப்பு இது.
reason: Parenting story about multilingual education in Tamil school. Positive educational content.

input_text: புதிய வீட்டிற்கு மாறிய பிறகு சமையலறையை புதுப்பித்தோம். RM12,000 செலவானது ஆனால் மிகவும் திருப்தியாக இருக்கிறது.
reason: Home renovation story about kitchen upgrade with budget. Practical content.

input_text: Weh korang, my weekend was so wholesome. Pergi gotong-royong kat taman then lepas tu semua makan potluck together. Very the kampung vibes!
reason: Mixed language post about community gotong-royong and potluck. Positive neighbourhood content.

input_text: Growing up in Malaysia memang best la. Every evening lepas sekolah main guli, main batu seremban with kawan-kawan. Now semua main phone je, boring gila.
reason: Nostalgic childhood memory mixing English and Malay. Wholesome personal content.

input_text: Just had the best char kuey teow ever kat Penang. Uncle tu goreng depan mata, the wok hei memang power. Harga pun only RM8, so worth it!
reason: Mixed language food review of char kuey teow in Penang. Positive culinary content.

input_text: Aku baru discover this hidden waterfall kat Hulu Langat. Crystal clear water and sangat peaceful. Perfect spot untuk escape from KL's hustle and bustle.
reason: Travel recommendation about hidden waterfall near KL. Positive nature content.

input_text: Personal finance tip for my fellow Malaysians: jangan guna credit card kalau tak boleh bayar penuh every month. Interest dia memang killer bro.
reason: Mixed language financial advice about credit card usage. Practical personal finance tip.

input_text: My cat Oyen ni memang drama queen. Bagi dia makan kibbles biasa, dia buat muka macam kita serve dia garbage. Kena bagi wet food baru happy. Diva betul!
reason: Humorous pet story about a fussy cat. Light-hearted animal content.

input_text: Last weekend我们一家人去做义工dekat old folks home. Honestly, just spending time talking to the makcik and pakcik there memang very fulfilling.
reason: Mixed language volunteer story at old folks home. Positive charity content blending Chinese, English, and Malay.

input_text: Only in Malaysia you can experience this: pagi makan nasi lemak, lunch makan wanton mee, dinner eat banana leaf rice. Three cultures, satu negara, best gila!
reason: Humorous observation celebrating Malaysia's multicultural food scene. Positive national pride content.

input_text: Parenting kat Malaysia ni unique gila. Anak cakap Malay kat school, English at home, then Mandarin with their tuition teacher. Multilingual from young!
reason: Positive observation about multilingual parenting in Malaysia. Wholesome educational content.

input_text: Our wedding theme was kampung style — we buat kenduri at my in-laws' house with catering from the local caterer. Total budget under RM10k and it was absolutely perfect.
reason: Wedding planning story about affordable kampung-style kenduri. Practical budget wedding content.

input_text: Baru habis renovate rumah, pasang ceiling fan baru sebab Malaysia's heat memang no joke. Now the living room rasa macam ada air-cond. Best investment ever!
reason: Home renovation story about ceiling fan installation. Practical tip for Malaysian climate.

input_text: I've been doing badminton every Tuesday and Thursday kat court dekat rumah. Memang the best cardio exercise, plus very social. Ramai jiran pun join sekali.
reason: Health and fitness story about community badminton. Positive social and exercise content.

input_text: Zaman kecik dulu, setiap Chinese New Year mesti pergi rumah kawan Cina makan mandarin orange and collect ang pow. Those were the days, so innocent and happy.
reason: Nostalgic multicultural childhood memory during Chinese New Year. Positive inter-ethnic friendship content.

input_text: 谁说jiran sekarang tak friendly? My neighbour auntie每天都会给我们homemade kuih. Kita balas bagi她curry puff. This is the Malaysia I love.
reason: Mixed language neighbourly story blending Chinese, Malay and English. Positive community content.

input_text: Moving to a new place memang stressful tapi lepas settle in, rasa lega gila. Pro tip: label semua boxes properly, nanti senang nak unpack. Trust me on this.
reason: Moving house advice mixing English and Malay. Practical life tip.

input_text: I remember as a kid in JB, we used to cross the causeway to Singapore just for the McDonald's breakfast because it tasted different somehow. Those cross-border adventures were the best.
reason: Nostalgic childhood memory about cross-border trips from JB to Singapore. Harmless personal story.

input_text: 每次回马来西亚最想念的就是早上去kopitiam喝kopi和吃kaya toast。那种味道在其他国家怎么都找不到，真的是家的味道。
reason: Nostalgic post about missing kopitiam breakfast when away from Malaysia. Wholesome cultural content.

input_text: My grandmother used to make the best kuih lapis every Hari Raya. She would spend two days in the kitchen, layering each colour perfectly. I wish I had learned her recipe before she passed.
reason: Nostalgic story about grandmother's traditional kuih making. Emotional but wholesome family memory.

input_text: Found an amazing nasi kandar place in Georgetown that has been running for 40 years. The dalca and ayam goreng berempah were absolutely incredible. This is what heritage food tastes like.
reason: Positive food review of heritage nasi kandar restaurant in Penang. Harmless culinary content.
